Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Matthews residence
Seattle, WA
Seating Capacity: 0
Venue Type : Misc

Total Gigs: 23
  Dave solo  (22)
  Dave & Preservation Hall Jazz Band  (1)

Longest Performance:
06.20.20 - That Girl Is You (5:53)
Description
This is Dave's private residence in Seattle. He also has a home in Charlottesville. During the COVID-19 pandemic, he recorded many performances from one home or the other.
